results.description: GE ADDITIVE IS DEVELOPING A NOVEL POWER GENERATION SYSTEM THAT ESTABLISHES OPERATIONAL ENERGY TO MEET PROLONGED, NEAR-ZERO MAINTENANCE POWER REQUIREMENTS. THE GE SYSTEM USES A CLOSED CYCLE ENGINE CONTAINING BOTH EXPANSION AND COMPRESSION CHAMBERS.

GE ADDITIVE IS DEVELOPING A NOVEL POWER GENERATION SYSTEM THAT ESTABLISHES OPERATIONAL ENERGY TO MEET PROLONGED, NEAR-ZERO MAINTENANCE POWER REQUIREMENTS. THE GE SYSTEM USES A CLOSED CYCLE ENGINE CONTAINING BOTH EXPANSION AND COMPRESSION CHAMBERS.
